MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-05-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT RAVE LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF GENERAL NANOTECHNOLOGY, INC. HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS WITH THE REQUISITE SPECIFICITY TO ALLEGE THE FIRST, THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANT RAVE, LLC. THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT UNCERTAIN. DEFENDANT RAVE, LLC'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED AS TO EXHIBIT 1 AND DENIED AS TO EXHIBITS 2 - 4. TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT RAVE, LLC RAISES ISSUES OF FACT, THIS IS NOT THE PROPER SUBJECT OF A DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT THAT A THIRD PARTY COMPLAINT WAS FILED IN TERRASPAN, LLC V. RAVE, LLC (N.D. CAL.) CASE NO. 3:12-CV-06298 JSW, BUT NOT TO THE TRUTH OF THE MATTERS ASSERTED THEREIN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPH WOOD OF THE LAW FIRM OF HEENEFLER & FINLEY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. NICOLE S. HEALY OF THE LAW FIRM OF ROPERS MAJESKI & BENTLEY, TEL. NO. (650) 364-8200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RAVE LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff General Nanotechnology, Inc. has pled sufficient facts with the requisite specificity to allege the first, third and fourth causes of action against Defendant Rave, LLC. The pleadings are not uncertain. Defendant Rave, LLC's request for judicial notice is granted as to Exhibit 1 and denied as to Exhibits 2 - 4. To the extent that Defendant Rave, LLC raises issues of fact, this is not the proper subject of a demurrer. Plaintiff's request for judicial notice is granted to the extent that a third party complaint was filed in Terraspan, LLC v. Rave, LLC (N.D. Cal.) case no. 3:12-cv-06298 JSW, but not to the truth of the matters asserted therein. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Continued To Feb-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RAVE LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to February 5, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 22, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
